title: Noida Regional Forum for Prospective Applicants
text: Regional forum in Noida Event Status: Completed Date: April 05, 2025 Location: Genesis Global School, A- 2, Noida-Greater Noida Expy, Block B, Sector 132, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304, India Recommended for: Potential applicants The IC3 Regional Forums are a mission-driven effort to bring counseling to every school. At the heart of the forums lies the belief that every student deserves access to guidance and clarity to build a fulfilling future. Genesis Global School, A- 2, Noida-Greater Noida Expy, Block B, Sector 132, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304, India Open address in Google Maps
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi hosted a regional forum in Noida on April 5, 2025, at Genesis Global School, providing educational counseling to potential applicants.
